title: Origins: Mob Staff
description: After Victim reviewing the fight between King Orange and The Second Coming, he created his own [Mob Staff].
body:
For this to work, you need the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins).
You can choose a different character to become your **origin** to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 version of origin, so for different versions, there may having bugs that not expected.

[Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/resource-pack-mob-staff) Download Here.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c411a7c4752ef53f3d87a13d24bfd5166b85395a.png)

# Victim

**After Victim reviewing the fight between King Orange and The Second Coming, he created his own [Mob Staff].**

## 🛠️ Creator

**You get one [Mob Staff] when Selected. Everyone can craft the [Mob Staff], but only you can use the True Power of it.**

<details>
  <summary>Recipies</summary>
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc31a868a66ef0f0d268000253a65f81debe08e.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f91ebe23f204bdcb6f022f7ce908d9f736e21e.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf71a94fff7d79e55c10d39c25e8e718067f49d.png)
</details>

## ⛓️ Monster Spawner

**If you killed non-player target with [Mob Staff], it will store the soul of target to a [Container]. You can spawn them back out but with 1 Health.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25c3f27aa7da0756f7cb5509d2dd5660ec2d0f7a.png)
## 💫 Power of soul

**When you Holding [Mob Staff] and [Container], Using [Secondary Active] will Bind the [Container] to the [Mob Staff], [Mob Staff] will Switch to relative power.**

<details>
  <summary>Mob Power list</summary>
  
# Classic Update
  
- **Creeper**
  - Passive
    - Attack will Blast Target Further.
  - Active
    - Charge for 2 seconds, You will Explode with power 6, and blast out target in 10 blocks.
- **Pig**
  - Passive
    - Carrot Will just same as Golden Carrot.
  - Active
    - You Can Pickup Target to Ride You. When Anything Riding you, You deal no damage. Use Again to Drop Pickuped Target.
- **Skeleton**
  - Passive
    - After You Used a bow, you receive a decay speed boost. 
    - When Victim Holding it in either mainhand or offhand, You can turn them to [Container] when kill them with projectile.
- **Zombie**
  - Passive
    - You receive +4 Attack Damage, No Mater on Mainhand or Offhand.
- **Spider**
  - Passive
    - You can climb on any surface. Include Under Roof.
  - Active
    - You have 2 charges, you can leap forward.
- **Sheep**
  - Active
    - When Rightclick when holding wheat, you heal 1 heart and regeneration.
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d922215777f40883001007c37b5e2e087231ad6.png)

> Using on empty Hand will revoke the [Container] from [Mob Staff].

> Power will granted on [Mob Staff], So Other Player Can Use the Passive Power of a active [Mob Staff], But not Active Power.

> If you have Two [Mob Staff] on Both Hand, Your Powers Can Use at the same time.

# Test Videos

  <summary>Test Videos</summary>

# Fulture Plans

- ~~Classic Update~~
  - ~~Creeper, Pig, Skeleton, Zombie, Spider, Sheep~~
- Alpha Update
  - Cow, Slime, Chicken, Ghast, Zombified Piglin
- Beta Update
  - Squid, Wolves, Cave Spider, Enderman, Silverfish
- 1.0 Update
  - Blaze, Magma cube, Mooshroom, Snow golem, Villager, Ender dragon
-
